heading: Prohibition on conversion
label: 214d Prohibition on conversion
text: A national banking association may not convert to a State bank or State savings association during any period in which the national banking association is subject to a cease and desist order (or other formal enforcement order) issued by, or a memorandum of understanding entered into with, the Comptroller of the Currency with respect to a significant supervisory matter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 1 day after , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .July 21, 2010section 4 of Pub. L. 111–203section 5301 of this title
